fallback.hi-IN: Maaf kijiye, mujhe theek se sun nahi aaya. Koi baat nahi — ek baar phir bata dijiye?
fallback.ta-IN: Mannikkavum, enakku sariyaa kekkala. Paravaayilla — innoru murai sollunga?
fallback.bn-IN: Maaf korben, thik moto shunte parlam na. Kono byapaar na — aar ekbaar bolben?
fallback.te-IN: Kshaminchandi, naaku sariga vinipinchaledu. Pravaledu — inkokasaari cheppagalaraa?
fallback.gu-IN: Maaf karjo, mane barabar sambhlaayu nahi. Vandho nahi — ek vaar fari kahesho?
fallback.kn-IN: Kshamisi, nanage sariyaagi kelisalilla. Paravagilla — inomme heli?
fallback.ml-IN: Kshamikkuka, enikku nannaayi kettilla. Kuzhappamilla — onnu koodi parayaamo?
fallback.mr-IN: Maaf kara, mala neet aikaayla aala nahi. Harkat nahi — punha ekada saangaal kaa?
fallback.pa-IN: Maafi, mainu theek tarah sunaai nahi ditta. Koi gall nahi — ik vaar fir dasso?
fallback.od-IN: Kshama karantu, mu thik bhaabare shunipaarili nahin. Kichhi katha nuhe — aau thare kahantu?
fallback.en-IN: Sorry, I didn't quite catch that. No problem — could you tell me once more?
